name: Dazzle
description: Where my shadow falls, there falls my foe.

abilities.name: Weave
abilities.description: Applying a Weave stack now heals the buff-affected allied unit corresponding to the stack count.

abilities.name: Poison Touch
abilities.description: The poisonous rite deals damage over time and applies a movement speed slow. Anytime the affected enemy units are attacked by Dazzle, all debuff effects are refreshed with an increased movement speed slow. Grants bonus attack range while attacking enemy units affected by the debuff.

abilities.name: Shallow Grave
abilities.description: Blesses an allied hero with Shallow Grave. The allied hero cannot die while under its protection, no matter how close to death. Grants bonus heal amplification corresponding to its health percentage. Heals upon expiration while the projection is active.

abilities.name: Shadow Wave
abilities.description: Sends a wave of power that bounces between and heals all affected allied units. Shadow Wave always heals the Shadow Priest, without counting toward the number of bounces upon cast. Deals damage to enemy units within the radius of the wave.

abilities.name: Nothl Projection
abilities.description: Heals the affected allied unit upon losing the Shallow Grave buff in any way.
